name: AIGentStyle
description: StyleTrainer Agent preparation plugin for LoRA dataset planning, parameter recommendation and dry-run training plans. It does not execute real training unless a later stage explicitly enables it.
author: VCPToolBox Team

AIGENT_STYLE_OUTPUT_ROOT.description: Root directory for generated training plans and future model outputs

AIGENT_STYLE_BACKEND.description: Training backend label for plan generation

AIGENT_STYLE_ALLOW_TRAINING.description: Safety gate for future real training execution. Stage 2 keeps this false.

invocationCommands.description: Scan a dataset directory and build a StyleTrainer readiness plan without executing training.
Recommend LoRA training parameters from scenario, base model and image count.
Generate a dry-run training command plan. No real training is executed.
Build a dataset manifest with image/caption readiness and preprocessing plan. Optional write_manifest writes only under the ignored outputs root.
Build a resumable dry-run training job manifest with preprocess/train/evaluate stages. No real training is executed.
Generate rule-based caption/tag drafts from filename, scenario and image dimensions. Optional writes require write_captions=true.
Run training execution preflight and return a dry-run executor plan. This stage never spawns a real training process.
Report StyleTrainer configuration and safety gate state.
